pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target levels are not updated to match the runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to use Java 21 source and target levels with preview features enabled.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit configuration, the compiler may default to an older Java version or fail to compile code using Java 21 preview features.
